_comment: Catalyst project descriptor (template). Run `catalyst init` in the repo to generate the real file with your project_id/project_name, or paste those values here. `catalyst deploy` reads this to know which components to push — for DRISHTI it's a single AppSail app plus the static frontend on Web Client Hosting.

client._comment: Optional: serve demo/frontend on Catalyst Web Client Hosting (Slate) instead of letting FastAPI StaticFiles serve it. If you keep FastAPI serving the frontend (current setup), you can omit this block.
